title: Domicile; meetings; staff
doc_html:
§45.  Domicile; meetings; staff

The commission shall be domiciled in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.  It shall meet at least biennially.  Necessary support staff shall be provided by appropriate committee staff of the legislature.

Acts 1995, No. 1077, §1.
